sentences.target: Die Arbeitslosigkeit macht mir gerade echt Angst.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈaʁbaɪ̯tsloːzɪçkaɪ̯t maxt miːɐ̯ ɡəˈʁaːdə ɛçt aŋst/

translations.de: Die Arbeitslosigkeit macht mir gerade echt Angst.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈaʁbaɪ̯tsloːzɪçkaɪ̯t maxt miːɐ̯ ɡəˈʁaːdə ɛçt aŋst/
translations.en: Unemployment really scares me right now.
translations.es: El desempleo me da mucho miedo ahora mismo.
translations.fr: Le chômage me fait vraiment peur en ce moment.
translations.it: La disoccupazione mi spaventa davvero in questo momento.
translations.zh-Hans: 现在的失业让我真的很害怕。
translations.yue: 而家失業真係令我好驚。
translations.pt: O desemprego me assusta muito agora.
translations.tr: İşsizlik şu anda beni gerçekten korkutuyor.
translations.vi: Tình trạng thất nghiệp làm tôi thật sự sợ lúc này.
translations.nl: Werkloosheid maakt me op dit moment echt bang.
translations.hi: मुझे बेरोजगारी से अभी सच में डर लग रहा है.
translations.el: Η ανεργία με τρομάζει πραγματικά αυτή τη στιγμή.
translations.nb: Arbeidsledighet gjør meg virkelig redd akkurat nå.
translations.id: Pengangguran benar-benar membuat saya takut saat ini.
translations.sv: Arbetslösheten skrämmer mig verkligen just nu.
translations.ro: Șomajul mă sperie cu adevărat acum.
translations.da: Arbejdsløsheden gør mig virkelig bange lige nu.
translations.fi: Työttömyys pelottaa minua tosi paljon juuri nyt.
translations.ja: 今、失業が本当に怖いです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine singular nominative; determiner of the subject NP 'Arbeitslosigkeit'.
Common noun; feminine singular nominative; subject of 'macht'.
Finite main verb; 3rd person singular present; forms the expression 'jemandem Angst machen' with dative experiencer and accusative object.
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular dative; indirect object/experiencer with 'macht'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause, indicating current time.
Degree adverb; intensifies the predicate/NP in 'echt Angst (machen)'.
Common noun; feminine singular accusative; direct object/complement in the expression 'Angst machen'.

sentences.target: Er ist frustriert wegen der Arbeitslosigkeit.

translations.de: Er ist frustriert wegen der Arbeitslosigkeit.
translations.en: He is frustrated because of unemployment.
translations.fr: Il est frustré à cause du chômage.
translations.zh-Hans: 他因为失业而感到沮丧。
translations.yue: 佢因為失業覺得好挫敗。
translations.pt: Ele está frustrado por causa do desemprego.
translations.tr: İşsizlik yüzünden o hayal kırıklığı yaşıyor.
translations.vi: Anh ấy thấy nản vì nạn thất nghiệp.
translations.nl: Hij is gefrustreerd door de werkloosheid.
translations.nb: Han er frustrert på grunn av arbeidsledigheten.
translations.ja: 彼は失業のせいでいらだっています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary; 3rd person singular present; links the subject to the predicative adjective.
Adjective (participial); predicative complement describing the subject’s emotional state.
Preposition; governs genitive; introduces the reason clause.
Definite article; feminine singular genitive; determiner for 'Arbeitslosigkeit' after 'wegen'.
Common noun; feminine singular genitive; object of the preposition 'wegen'; expresses the cause.

sentences.target: Im Radio sprechen sie über die Arbeitslosigkeit.
sentences.reading: /ɪm ˈʁaːdi̯o ˈʃpʁɛçn̩ ziː ˈyːbɐ diː ˈaʁbaɪ̯tsloːzɪçkaɪ̯t/

translations.de: Im Radio sprechen sie über die Arbeitslosigkeit.
translations.ipa: /ɪm ˈʁaːdi̯o ˈʃpʁɛçn̩ ziː ˈyːbɐ diː ˈaʁbaɪ̯tsloːzɪçkaɪ̯t/
translations.en: On the radio, they are talking about unemployment.
translations.es: En la radio hablan del desempleo.
translations.fr: À la radio, ils parlent du chômage.
translations.pt: No rádio estão falando sobre o desemprego.
translations.vi: Trên radio, họ đang nói về thất nghiệp.
translations.nl: Op de radio praten ze over werkloosheid.
translations.hi: रेडियो पर बेरोजगारी के बारे में बात हो रही है.
translations.el: Στο ραδιόφωνο μιλάνε για την ανεργία.
translations.nb: På radioen snakker de om arbeidsledighet.
translations.id: Di radio mereka sedang membicarakan soal pengangguran.
translations.sv: På radion pratar de om arbetslöshet.
translations.da: I radioen taler de om arbejdsløshed.
translations.ja: ラジオで失業について話しています。

tokens.explanation: Fused form of 'in dem'; preposition introducing a dative locative PP.
Common noun; neuter singular dative; object of the preposition 'im'; denotes medium/location.
Finite main verb; 3rd person plural present; predicate of the clause.
Personal pronoun; 3rd person plural nominative; subject of 'sprechen'.
Preposition; governs accusative when indicating topic.
Definite article; feminine singular accusative; determiner for 'Arbeitslosigkeit' after 'über'.
Common noun; feminine singular accusative; object of 'über'; topic of discussion.

sentences.target: Ich melde mich wegen meiner Arbeitslosigkeit.

translations.de: Ich melde mich wegen meiner Arbeitslosigkeit.
translations.en: I’m getting in touch because of my unemployment.
translations.es: Me estoy comunicando por mi situación de desempleo.
translations.fr: Je vous contacte au sujet de ma situation de chômage.
translations.it: Chiamo per la mia situazione di disoccupazione.
translations.yue: 我因為失業而聯絡你哋。
translations.ru: Я обращаюсь по поводу своей безработицы.
translations.pt: Estou entrando em contato por causa do meu desemprego.
translations.vi: Tôi liên lạc vì tình trạng thất nghiệp của tôi.
translations.nl: Ik neem contact op vanwege mijn werkloosheid.
translations.hi: मैं अपनी बेरोजगारी के बारे में संपर्क कर रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Kontaktuję się z powodu mojego bezrobocia.
translations.nb: Jeg tar kontakt på grunn av min arbeidsledighet.
translations.id: Saya menghubungi karena saya sedang menganggur.
translations.sv: Jag hör av mig på grund av min arbetslöshet.
translations.ro: Vă contactez din cauza șomajului meu.
translations.da: Jeg tager kontakt på grund af min arbejdsløshed.
translations.ja: 失業の件でご連絡しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; 1st person singular present; part of the reflexive construction 'sich melden'.
Personal reflexive pronoun; 1st person singular accusative; coreferential with the subject; required by 'sich melden'.
Preposition; governs genitive; introduces the reason for the action.
Possessive determiner; feminine singular genitive; modifies 'Arbeitslosigkeit'.
Common noun; feminine singular genitive; object of 'wegen'; denotes the reason.
